description_long: This house features a rectangular, brick-clad exterior with a flat roof and multiple window arrangements on each visible side. The structure includes a main building and an attached garage, both with light-colored doors and a consistent brick pattern. The upper floor is partially open, revealing interior rooms with varied wall finishes, including tiled and painted surfaces, and some visible furniture. The windows are mostly arranged in pairs or small groups, providing natural light to the interior spaces. The main entryway is recessed, with a double-door design and a small overhang, while the garage has a single, prominent door. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functional layout.
description: A modern, flat-roofed brick house with an attached garage, multiple windows, and a partially open upper floor revealing interior rooms. The design is functional, with a recessed main entryway and minimal decorative features.
description_view_0: This view shows the front facade with a recessed double-door entryway, several windows, and a partial view of the open upper floor interior.
description_view_1: The left side is visible here, highlighting the brick exterior, asymmetrical window placement, and the rear portion of the house.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the attached garage with its flat roof, a side door, and a glimpse of the interior layout through the open upper floor.
description_view_3: The rear facade is shown, featuring more windows, the garage extension, and a clear view of the open-plan upper floor rooms.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed double-door entry with a small overhang, no porch or decorative columns
